step_rationale: Inflammatory mediator in CAD; IL-17 family promotes plaque inflammation and destabilization.
mechanism: IL-17E drives vascular inflammation and predicts post-MI cardiac remodeling through pro-inflammatory T-cell signaling.

references.title: Comprehensive Quality Analysis of Conventional and Novel Biomarkers in Diagnosing and Predicting Prognosis of Coronary Artery Disease, Acute Coronary Syndrome, and Heart Failure, a Comprehensive Literature Review.
Harnessing the Plasma Proteome to Mirror Current and Predict Future Cardiac Remodeling After Myocardial Infarction.
Neutrophils, neutrophil extracellular traps and interleukin-17 associate with the organisation of thrombi in acute myocardial infarction.
